# Pull Request

## Summary

<!-- What does this change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] New skill
- [ ] Skill improvement
- [ ] Connector (mock-first)
- [ ] Core server / engine
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run validate:skills` passes (if skills changed)
- [ ] No secrets added anywhere (source, skills, examples, tests, docs, history)
- [ ] No unsupported performance promises (rankings, revenue, leads guaranteed)
- [ ] Facts, assumptions and recommendations are clearly separated
- [ ] High-risk actions require approval and default to dry-run
- [ ] `last_reviewed` set for platform-dependent content
- [ ] British English, ISO 8601 dates, explicit currency/locale/timezone

## Reviewer notes

<!-- Anything reviewers should focus on. New skills/connectors need a domain reviewer. -->
